name: io.github.bch1212/agenttrust
description: Trust scores & reputation for the agent-to-agent economy. Verify counterparties before A2A transactions.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTTRUST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for write operations. Reads are public. Free tier: 100 writes/day.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTTRUST_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL for self-hosted deployments.
